daily.today_energy: Your intuitive radar is firing on all cylinders today. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower right now. The universe is whispering something important, so slow down and actually listen.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, vulnerability is your love language today. Let someone see the real, messy, beautiful you. Connection deepens when you stop performing and just exist.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are exactly what people need to hear. Don't dim your ideas because they feel unconventional—that's literally your edge. Speak up in that meeting or send that proposal.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Whether it's stretching, a long walk, or just drinking water like it's a personality trait, honor what feels nourishing. Rest isn't lazy, it's maintenance.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
